headline: Arista Networks (ANET): 1.6T Launch Shows How AI Fabrics Are Expanding Its Data Center Opportunity
summary: Arista Networks, Inc. (NYSE:ANET) is one of the high growth low debt stocks to invest in right now. The company fits the list because AI data-center demand is translating into strong revenue growth while Arista continues to operate with high margins and a cash-heavy balance sheet.
